name: doc-build-index
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>plan>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: repo|diff|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs,compat},deterministic-output |
 lens: nielsen-norman |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: DOCSET_KIND
required_inputs.description: Primary kind of knowledge surface being documented.

required_inputs.name: DOC_FORM
required_inputs.description: Document form for the generated analysis docs. Default is guide for module/library trees and paper-summary for paper targets when omitted.

required_inputs.name: TARGET_SCOPE
required_inputs.description: Exact hierarchy or source set to document.

required_inputs.name: INDEX_DEPTH
required_inputs.description: How deep the analysis and index hierarchy should go.

required_inputs.name: INDEX_LAYOUT
required_inputs.description: Where index files should live. Default is docs-mirror when omitted.

required_inputs.name: AUDIENCE
required_inputs.description: Primary audience for the resulting docset.

required_inputs.name: AUDIENCE_LEVEL
required_inputs.description: Difficulty level. Default is general-reader language when omitted.

required_inputs.name: EVIDENCE_LINKS
required_inputs.description: Files, library docs, papers, or other sources used to support the analysis docs.
